query: update task breakdown and implement phase 2.1 phase 2.2

results.title: Phase 14 audit-alignment execution pattern
results.content: Final planning-audit-alignment execution should stay metadata-only: mark all completed v1 requirements as checked, keep traceability pointing to closure phases 07-13, remove stale non-v1 IDs from Phase 1 summary metadata, delete stale HANDOFF/.continue-here artifacts, and add a short 14-VERIFICATION plus 14-01-SUMMARY. After phase complete, manually patch STATE/ROADMAP/PROJECT body text because phase-complete updates frontmatter more reliably than narrative sections.

results.title: Lifecycle commands synced to all agent layers
results.content: Updated all 3 layers to include Group B lifecycle commands (new-project, map-codebase, discuss-phase, plan-phase, execute-phase, ship, progress, next, milestone) and Group C utilities (todo, stats, health, note, do). Files updated: .github/copilot-instructions.md (replaced AI Workflow Commands section with 3 groups A/B/C), .agents/workflows/full-lifecycle-delivery.md (added Lifecycle Path section with per-phase loop), .agents/workflows/execute-plan.md (added lifecycle path mode detection, coder debug on error, coder note for blockers), .agents/workflows/new-requirement.md (added scope detection: small feature vs new project with coder new-project, next steps branching), .agents/workflows/update-planning.md (added coder progress/next/health/milestone audit/note integration). All workflows now aware of both quick-path (PLAN.md) and lifecycle-path (STATE.md) modes.

results.title: Implemented Minder Phase 2 agentic pipeline
results.content: Closed the repo's documented Phase 2 by adding a minimal end-to-end agentic pipeline: graph state, workflow planner, planning/retrieval/reasoning/LLM/guard/verification/evaluator nodes, graph assembly, local Qwen/OpenAI fallback interfaces, history/error stores, query tools, and docker sandbox stub. Added Phase 2 unit coverage plus tests/integration/test_phase2_gate.py covering reasoned responses with sources, TDD prompt injection, docker-mode verification, unsafe output blocking, workflow step advancement, and history/error recording. Verified with UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run ruff check ., uv run mypy src, and uv run pytest (68 passed).

results.title: README + CLI docs + dashboard-plan cleanup
results.content: Updated docs/cli.md: full command reference for all 3 groups (A=quick AI: chat/review/debug/plan/qa/session/workflow, B=lifecycle: new-project/map-codebase/discuss-phase/plan-phase/execute-phase/ship/progress/next/milestone, C=utilities: todo/stats/health/note/do). Updated README.md: fixed broken links (skill_architecture.md→skill_system.md, memory.md→memory_system.md), added GUIDE.md to docs table, updated Features table (+AI Workflow Commands +Project Lifecycle +Web Dashboard), updated Key Commands section with 3 groups, added 5 Steps quick start (with lifecycle example), updated tagline, added Intelligence Roadmap link. Deleted docs/dashboard-plan.md (feature already implemented and documented in docs/dashboard.md). Build OK.

results.title: Artifact and Documentation Sync
results.content: Updated implementation plan, created technical docs for Secure Mode and Dashboard, and updated project walkthrough based on latest codebase changes.
